name: remediation
description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
sprintGoal: GGE G5 passes: manifest.json contains at least one pending increment, unblocking the planning pipeline.

stories.title: ANDON: Restore broken GGE — Planning pipeline always has a pending increment
stories.description: GGE G5 indicator is failing. Add a pending increment to manifest.json.
acceptanceCriteria: GGE G5 indicator passes: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); pending=[i for i in m.get('increments',[]) if i.get('status')=='pending']; assert len(pending)>=1; print('OK')"
stories.testPlan: python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('prd/manifest.json')); pending=[i for i in m.get('increments',[]) if i.get('status')=='pending']; assert len(pending)>=1; print('OK')" — must exit 0 and print OK. Show output verbatim.
